title: mentha × villosa var. billotiana
intro: Mentha × villosa var. billotiana, also known as Corsican mint, is a variety of the Mentha villosa species, which is a type of hybrid mint plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a carminative, relieving digestive issues such as bloating and gas, and its antiseptic properties, which can help to heal wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Corsican mint include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce nausea and vomiting, and even help to manage stress and anxiety. Corsican mint can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
